lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: G'day, mate. I'm Simon - Simon Templeton. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm [player name]. What are you doing all the way out here?

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: I've been contracted to retrieve artefacts from the top of this magnificent pyramid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, why are you down here and not up there then?

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Well, it's me back - an old injury I picked up in Sophanem has come back to haunt me. I was working for the Museum of Varrock, and the gold I had been given wasn't enough to pay for the carpet rides, let

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: alone any decent equipment. But that was a long time ago... I can't even lift a chisel right now. There's no way I can climb all the way up there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How on earth did you get down the cliff face, then?

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: That's what set off the injury. I was fine before I scrabbled down that pesky slope. I think it will be a while before I can climb back up again; I must be getting old.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Hang on a second... You look like you're pretty agile and up for a challenge. How about you retrieve it for me?

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: I'll tell you what, I'll give you 10000 coins for every artefact you get for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Good on ya, mate!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Simon.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: G'day, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's it going?

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Not bad, mate, not bad at all. Got any artefacts for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I haven't.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Try harder, mate! It won't be long till some other critter turns up and snatches them out from under your eyes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Bye, cobber.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Ripper! Thanks a bundle, mate! Thanks to you I can fulfill me contract. You're a true blue! The boss will be pleased.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Glad I was able to help... but who is your boss? I thought you worked for the museum?

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Mind your own bizzo, mate. But if you get any more, you know where I am!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have one, but I want to keep it for now.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Careful, mate, people might come looking for a thing like that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the advice, but I'll hang onto it for now.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Bye, cobber.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some, but I want to keep them for now.

sections.title: After selling at least one Pyramid Top

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: G'day, mate. Got any new pyramid artefacts for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I haven't.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Well, keep my offer in mind if you do find one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will. Goodbye, Simon.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Bye, mate.

sections.title: With Pyramid Plunder artefacts in inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some interesting artefacts I'd like you to look at.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Bonzer! Let's have a Butcher's mate.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Do you want to flog the lot of 'em?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, show me the money.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Fair Dinkum mate, Bonzer doing business with you mate.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: You sellin' me this gold coloured stick thing. Looks fake to me. I'll give you 100 gold for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What! This is a genuine pharaoh's sceptre - made out of solid gold and finely jewelled with precious gems by the finest craftsmen in the area.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Strewth! I can tell a pile of croc when I hear it! You've got the patter mate, but I'm no mug. That's a fake.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It has magical powers!

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Oh, magical powers ... yeah, yeah, yeah. Heard it all before mate. I'll give you a 100 gold, or some 'magic beans'. Take it or leave it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think so! I'll find someone who'll give me what it's worth.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Suit yerself.. You wanna sell the other artefacts you have?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, as long as I get a decent price for them.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Fair Dinkum mate, Bonzer doing business with you mate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nah, I've changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, let me think about it.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: No probs mate. Just give me the items you want to sell and we can do them one by one.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Ripper! Thanks a bundle, mate! Thanks to you I can fulfill me contract. You're a true blue! The boss will be pleased.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Glad I was able to help... but who is your boss? I thought you worked for the museum?

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Mind your own bizzo, mate. But if you get any more, you know where I am!

sections.title: If the player hasn't talked to him before

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: That's a nice looking artefact you got there mate. Gimme a chat and lemme explain what these are all about first!

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: You wanna sell that mate?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, show me the money.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Cheers mate!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I think I'll keep it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some interesting artefacts I'd like you to look at.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: You sellin' me this gold coloured stick thing. Looks fake to me. I'll give you 100 gold for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What! This is a genuine pharaoh's sceptre - made out of solid gold and finely jewelled with precious gems by the finest craftsmen in the area.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Strewth! I can tell a pile of croc when I hear it! You've got the patter mate, but I'm no mug. That's a fake.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It has magical powers!

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Oh, magical powers ... yeah, yeah, yeah. Heard it all before mate. I'll give you a 100 gold, or some 'magic beans'. Take it or leave it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think so! I'll find someone who'll give me what it's worth.

lines.speaker: Simon Templeton
lines.text: Suit yerself..
